title: Guarianthe × guatemalensis
taxonomy: Guarianthe × guatemalensis is a hybrid species within the orchid family (Orchidaceae). It is a cross between the species Guarianthe vrydaghi and Guarianthe warocquieri. The resulting hybrid is native to the tropical rainforests of Central America. As a hybrid, its classification is often considered under the species name Guarianthe × guatemalensis, rather than being classified into a distinct genus. The classification of Guarianthe × guatemalensis is still subject to some debate among botanists.

intro: Guarianthe × guatemalensis, also known as the Guatemalan orchid or Encanto Orchid, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as wounds, infections, and respiratory issues.
